subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath made manifest His Cause and made known unto His servants that which was inscribed in the Books and Tablets. Say: O concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر امره و عرف العباد ما کان مسطورا فی الزبر و الالواح قل یا ملا
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @proclamation to the people of the world, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
